questions.question: Paul calls Timothy his true child in what?
questions.feedback: Paul addresses Timothy as his true child in the faith.

questions.question: Paul says Christ Jesus came into the world to do what?
questions.feedback: Christ Jesus came into the world to save sinners, of whom Paul says he is the foremost.

questions.question: Paul says the law is good if one uses it lawfully.
questions.feedback: Paul affirms the law is good if one uses it lawfully.

questions.question: The aim of Paul's charge is love from a pure heart, a good _____, and sincere faith.
questions.feedback: The goal is love from a pure heart, good conscience, and sincere faith.

questions.question: Paul handed Hymenaeus and Alexander over to _____ so they would learn not to blaspheme.
questions.feedback: Paul handed them to Satan that they might learn not to blaspheme.
